'''Been''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Otolla/Legends|Otolla]] [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] who was a member of the [[Gungan High Council/Legends|Gungan High Council]] at the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] and lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Biography==
[[File:BeenGCW.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Been during the Galactic Civil War.]]
Been was the keeper of the ancient records of the Gungans, and knew the locations of many secret Gungan hiding places. During the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion of Naboo]], Been supported [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]]' decision to evacuate the population of [[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]] to the [[Gungan Sacred Place/Legends|sacred place]], and later agreed with him in forming an alliance with [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]].

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] sometime following [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Been could still be found at the sacred place. While there, he employed the help of a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]]. The spacer, who was sympathetic to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]], was first tasked with retrieving documents from [[Boona Tanje]]. After successfully completing the task, Been gave the spacer three more missions. The next mission was to escort a [[Human/Legends|Human]] female named [[Reefa Been]] back to the sacred place. Though the spacer was ambushed by four bandits, Reefa was returned safely. The spacer was then told to kill the bandit leader, and escort an individual named [[Vajoo Jinssa]] back to the sacred place. Once again, the spacer failed to let Been down.

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Wikipedia:MMORPG|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', Been appeared as a [[Wikipedia:non-player character|Non-Player Character]] (NPC) in the Gungan sacred place point of interest. Here, players could take a series of quests from Been which involved simple kill, escort, or delivery objectives. Much of his quest dialogue was bugged, and Been was eventually removed from the game.
